title: Mellow Smoked Jamaican Sweet Potato Casserole
description: A bitter, velvety, and festive Jamaican dish featuring vanilla sugar and smoke, perfect for lacto-vegetarian diets. This casserole is a unique blend of flavors and textures.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, combine the diced sweet potatoes, vanilla sugar, smoked paprika, and cinnamon.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the coconut milk, melted butter, brown sugar, and nutmeg.
Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and stir until the sweet potatoes are well coated.
Transfer the mixture to a 9x13 inch baking dish and cover with aluminum foil.
Bake for 30 minutes, then remove the foil and continue baking for an additional 20 minutes.
Remove the casserole from the oven and let it cool for 10 minutes before serving.
Serve the casserole warm, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
